Welcome to ASE 2025 in Seoul

Seoul, South Korea

Seoul, South Korea

Gyeongbokgung Palace, Seoul

ASE 2025

Welcome to the website of the 40th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering, ASE 2025. The ASE conference is the premier research forum for Automated Software Engineering. Each year, it brings together researchers and practitioners from academia and industry to discuss foundations, techniques, and tools for automating the analysis, design, implementation, testing, and maintenance of large software systems.

ASE 2025 will be in Seoul, Republic of Korea. We are working hard to prepare the webpage and also looking forward to seeing you in Seoul!

Photos from ASE 2025

  • 16th November: https://photos.app.goo.gl/4uEvsLoRuavzAzhL8
  • 17th November: https://photos.app.goo.gl/skDXJsiEuwg2jx1X9
  • 18th November: https://photos.app.goo.gl/Ask7JmGiDSgbP1jM6
  • 19th November: https://photos.app.goo.gl/JM1yMJGcAWebXVjs8
  • 20th November: https://photos.app.goo.gl/m6E8uu3fPq2NV2qg9

Early registration is until 15th October (2025.09.29)

Do not miss the early registration, which remains open until 15th October!

ASE 2025 is going Poster-First (2025.09.04)

With the large number of submissions, ASE 2025 adopts a poster-first event format. We believe that poster sessions will offer the opportunity to bring discussions back to our conferences. All accepted papers gets 1) a short teaser talk session earlier in the day, and 2) a 2.5 hour poster session in the afternoon. Note that talks are strictly to be teasers, and will be short.

UPDATE 25.11.17: Detailed poster locations are announced: Click Here!

You can directly download the Poster Map in PDF format.

Stay Connected on BlueSky! Follow our official account for updates and insights: @aseconf.bsky.social
